strengths: 19 years of engineering across diverse domains (web, mobile, embedded, infrastructure) with current exposure to AI infrastructure and MCP frameworks
Strong cloud expertise demonstrated through AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker, and large-scale infrastructure work (millions of requests/second, real-time systems)
Proven ability to learn and pivot across technologies and problem domains while maintaining software craftsmanship practices
concerns: Limited evidence of recognized AI product expertise—current AI work focuses on infrastructure/tooling rather than demonstrated AI-powered products or platforms
No advanced degree in AI-related field and no background in ML, data science, or AI product development mentioned in career history
Career trajectory is individual contributor/Staff-level; lacks clear evidence of director-level strategic partnerships, customer advisory work, or driving organizational strategy
response.justification: Bogdan meets minimum requirements with 19 years of engineering experience and a CS degree, bringing valuable cloud infrastructure expertise and recent exposure to AI systems through MCP and agentic frameworks. However, the role explicitly emphasizes "recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI" to advise customers and partners on cutting-edge adoption. His current AI work is infrastructure-focused rather than product-level, and there is no prior background in ML, data science, or AI product development. Additionally, the director-level strategic responsibilities—partnering on initiatives, advising customers, inspiring difficult organizational work—are not clearly evidenced in a resume showing primarily Staff-level individual contributor roles. He represents a strong engineering foundation with promising trajectory toward AI strategy, but currently lacks the demonstrated AI product expertise and strategic director-level experience the position requires.
